channel.title: Baqi Siddiqui on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Baqi Siddiqui on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: daag-e-dil humko yaad aane lage
item.description:
Pakistan’s great ghazal singer Iqbal Bano passed away today in Lahore. May her soul rest in peace. Here is a small tribute to the great singer in the form of a wonderful ghazal sung by her. The poet is Baqi Siddiqui.

daag-e-dil humko yaad aane lage log apne diye jalane lage

khud farebi si khud farebi hai paas ke dhol b suhaane lage

ab to hota hai har qadam pe gumaan hum yeh kaisa qadam uthane lage
